basis: cell A passes flood_depth <= 1.0 and slope <= 10

deliverables.summary: Packet-only KPI specification with exact cell citations, exclusion logic, intermediate calculations, sensitivity notes, validation checks, and final decision table.

notes: Cells B and C use the field name road instead of distance_road; the values were treated as the same road-distance measure for scoring because the packet provides one road-distance value per cell.
No numeric inputs were missing; no external data lookup was used.
